hero.title: Where Science Meets Serenity
hero.headline: Where Science Meets Serenity
hero.subtitle: Experience the art of elevated wellness at Sage & Stone. Medical-grade treatments and restorative spa rituals, thoughtfully curated to reveal your most radiant self.
serviceCategories.headline: Our Treatment Collections
serviceCategories.subtitle: From restorative bodywork to advanced aesthetic medicine, explore our curated categories of care.
serviceCategories.daySpa.title: Day Spa
serviceCategories.daySpa.description: Therapeutic rituals for the body and mind — massage, body treatments, head spa experiences, and curated wellness packages.
serviceCategories.medSpa.title: Med Spa
serviceCategories.medSpa.description: Clinically advanced treatments that refine, restore, and rejuvenate — from facials and injectables to skin resurfacing and body contouring.
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A curated collection of treatments designed to nurture, restore, and transform — from therapeutic bodywork to advanced aesthetic medicine.
services.swedishMassage.name: Swedish Massage
services.swedishMassage.shortDescription: A classic, flowing massage that eases tension and invites deep relaxation.
services.swedishMassage.fullDescription: Our Swedish Massage is the foundation of total-body relaxation. Using long, gliding strokes, gentle kneading, and rhythmic techniques, your therapist will melt away surface tension and encourage healthy circulation. Warm aromatherapy oils are selected to complement your session, enveloping you in calm from the first touch. Ideal for first-time guests or anyone seeking a tranquil escape from the pace of daily life.
services.deepTissueMassage.name: Deep Tissue Massage
services.deepTissueMassage.shortDescript: Targeted pressure to release chronic tension and restore deep muscular ease.
services.deepTissueMassage.fullDescripti: Our Deep Tissue Massage is designed for those who carry tension below the surface. Your therapist applies slow, deliberate pressure to reach the deeper layers of muscle and fascia, releasing chronic knots and adhesions that limit mobility and comfort. Focused attention is given to areas of persistent tightness — shoulders, lower back, neck — while maintaining a therapeutic rhythm that keeps the experience deeply restorative rather than merely intense.
services.prenatalMassage.name: Prenatal Massage
services.prenatalMassage.shortDescriptio: Gentle, nurturing bodywork tailored to the unique needs of expectant mothers.
services.prenatalMassage.fullDescription: Our Prenatal Massage offers expectant mothers a sanctuary of comfort during every stage of pregnancy. Using specialized positioning and gentle, adaptive techniques, your therapist addresses the areas most affected by the changes of pregnancy — lower back, hips, legs, and swollen extremities. This treatment helps reduce discomfort, ease anxiety, and support restful sleep, all within a warm and attentive environment designed to honor this extraordinary time.
services.couplesMassage.name: Couples Massage
services.couplesMassage.shortDescription: Share a side-by-side massage experience in our private couples suite.
services.couplesMassage.fullDescription: Our Couples Massage invites you and your partner to unwind together in the tranquility of our private suite. Two skilled therapists work in harmony, tailoring each massage to individual preferences — whether you both prefer a gentle Swedish touch or one of you craves deeper therapeutic work. The session begins with a warm welcome ritual and concludes with time to relax together over herbal tea. A meaningful way to celebrate a special occasion or simply reconnect.
services.lymphaticDrainageMassage.name: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
services.lymphaticDrainageMassage.shortD: A light, rhythmic technique that promotes detoxification and reduces swelling.
services.lymphaticDrainageMassage.fullDe: Our Lymphatic Drainage Massage uses feather-light, wave-like strokes to gently stimulate the lymphatic system and encourage the natural elimination of toxins and excess fluid. This profoundly soothing treatment is ideal for post-surgical recovery, reducing puffiness, supporting immune health, or simply resetting after periods of travel or stress. Each session is performed with precision and care, allowing the body to recalibrate at its own pace.
services.headSpaRitual.name: Head Spa Ritual
services.headSpaRitual.shortDescription: A luxurious scalp and hair treatment that melts tension and restores vitality.
services.headSpaRitual.fullDescription: The Head Spa Ritual is a deeply immersive experience inspired by Japanese head spa traditions. Beginning with a detailed scalp analysis, your therapist selects botanical serums and oils tailored to your scalp's needs. A warm cleansing ritual is followed by extended scalp massage using acupressure techniques that release tension from the head, neck, and temples. A nourishing hair mask and steam treatment complete the journey, leaving your scalp balanced, your hair luminous, and your mind profoundly still.
services.koreanBodyScrub.name: Korean Body Scrub
services.koreanBodyScrub.shortDescriptio: An invigorating full-body exfoliation that reveals impossibly soft, renewed skin.
services.koreanBodyScrub.fullDescription: Our Korean Body Scrub is a time-honored exfoliation ritual that transforms the skin in a single session. Using traditional exfoliating mitts, your therapist removes layers of dead skin through gentle but thorough friction, revealing the fresh, luminous skin beneath. The treatment includes a warm rinse, a hydrating body milk application, and a brief relaxation period. The result is a level of softness and clarity that no product alone can achieve — skin that feels entirely new.
services.detoxBodyWrap.name: Detox Body Wrap
services.detoxBodyWrap.shortDescription: A purifying wrap that draws out impurities and deeply hydrates the skin.
services.detoxBodyWrap.fullDescription: Our Detox Body Wrap begins with a gentle dry brush exfoliation to prepare the skin, followed by the application of a mineral-rich body mask infused with sea kelp, French green clay, and essential oils. As you are cocooned in warm linens, the mask works to draw out impurities, reduce inflammation, and deliver deep hydration. A soothing scalp massage accompanies the wrap phase, transforming the treatment into a full sensory retreat. You emerge feeling lighter, smoother, and deeply renewed.
services.relaxationPackage.name: Relaxation Package
services.relaxationPackage.shortDescript: A half-day escape combining our most beloved treatments into one seamless journey.
services.relaxationPackage.fullDescripti: The Relaxation Package is our signature half-day retreat, designed for those who deserve an unhurried escape. The journey begins with a Detox Body Wrap to purify and soften the skin, followed by a 60-minute Swedish Massage to dissolve tension from head to toe, and concludes with our Signature Facial to restore radiance to the complexion. Between treatments, enjoy time in our relaxation lounge with herbal infusions and light refreshments. This is wellness without watching the clock.
services.signatureFacial.name: Signature Facial
services.signatureFacial.shortDescriptio: A customized facial experience that addresses your skin's unique needs today.
services.signatureFacial.fullDescription: Our Signature Facial is where personalized skincare begins. Your esthetician conducts a thorough skin analysis before selecting from our curated range of clinical-grade products to build a treatment uniquely suited to your complexion. The session includes deep cleansing, gentle exfoliation, extractions as needed, a targeted treatment mask, and a layered hydration finish. Whether your concern is dullness, congestion, sensitivity, or early signs of aging, this facial meets you exactly where your skin is today.
services.radianceFacial.name: Radiance Facial
services.radianceFacial.shortDescription: An illuminating treatment that restores glow, clarity, and evenness to tired skin.
services.radianceFacial.fullDescription: The Radiance Facial is crafted for skin that has lost its light. Using a combination of enzymatic exfoliation, vitamin C infusion, and brightening botanicals, this treatment targets hyperpigmentation, uneven tone, and the dullness that comes from stress, sun exposure, or seasonal change. A cooling hyaluronic mask seals in luminosity while LED light therapy accelerates cellular renewal. You leave with skin that looks lit from within — clear, even, and unmistakably vibrant.
services.acneClarifyingFacial.name: Acne Clarifying Facial
services.acneClarifyingFacial.shortDescr: A purifying treatment that calms active breakouts and prevents future congestion.
services.acneClarifyingFacial.fullDescri: Our Acne Clarifying Facial is a results-driven treatment for skin prone to breakouts, congestion, and excess oil. Using medical-grade salicylic and glycolic formulations, your esthetician performs a thorough deep cleanse, careful extractions, and a calming antibacterial mask. High-frequency technology is applied to reduce inflammation and accelerate healing. The session concludes with a lightweight, non-comedogenic hydration layer and targeted spot treatment. This facial brings clarity without stripping — restoring balance and confidence.
services.antiAgingFacial.name: Anti-Aging Facial
services.antiAgingFacial.shortDescriptio: An advanced restorative facial that targets fine lines, firmness, and elasticity.
services.antiAgingFacial.fullDescription: Our Anti-Aging Facial is a sophisticated treatment designed to turn back the visible effects of time and environmental stress. Combining retinol, peptide-rich serums, and collagen-boosting technology, this facial works at every layer of the skin to smooth fine lines, restore firmness, and improve elasticity. Microcurrent stimulation lifts and tones facial muscles while a luxurious gold collagen mask delivers intense nourishment. The result is skin that looks and feels measurably younger — supple, lifted, and deeply hydrated.
services.botoxDysport.name: Botox & Dysport
services.botoxDysport.shortDescription: Precision neuromodulator injections to smooth wrinkles and refresh your expression.
services.botoxDysport.fullDescription: Our Botox and Dysport treatments are administered by experienced medical professionals who understand that the goal is never to freeze, but to refine. During your consultation, we assess your facial anatomy, discuss your aesthetic goals, and develop an injection plan that preserves natural movement while softening dynamic wrinkles — forehead lines, crow's feet, frown lines, and more. Results appear gradually over 5–14 days and last 3–4 months. Every treatment at Sage & Stone prioritizes subtlety: you will look rested, refreshed, and unmistakably yourself.
services.dermalFillers.name: Dermal Fillers
services.dermalFillers.shortDescription: Restore volume, contour, and youthful fullness with expertly placed hyaluronic acid fillers.
services.dermalFillers.fullDescription: Our Dermal Filler treatments restore what time takes away — volume, definition, and softness. Using premium hyaluronic acid fillers, our injectors artfully address areas of volume loss including cheeks, lips, nasolabial folds, jawline, and under-eye hollows. Every treatment begins with a thorough consultation and facial mapping to ensure results that enhance your natural proportions rather than alter them. We use advanced techniques including microcannula placement to minimize bruising and maximize comfort. Results are immediate and continue to refine over the following two weeks.
services.chemicalPeel.name: Chemical Peel
services.chemicalPeel.shortDescription: A controlled exfoliation that accelerates cell turnover for smoother, clearer skin.
services.chemicalPeel.fullDescription: Our Chemical Peel treatments range from gentle refreshers to transformative medical-grade peels, each selected based on your skin type, concerns, and tolerance. Using carefully formulated acids — glycolic, lactic, salicylic, or TCA — the peel removes damaged outer layers to reveal the healthier, more even-toned skin beneath. Your provider will guide you through pre-peel preparation and post-peel care to ensure optimal results with minimal downtime. Ideal for addressing sun damage, acne scarring, fine lines, melasma, and overall texture refinement.
services.microneedling.name: Microneedling
services.microneedling.shortDescription: Collagen-stimulating micro-injuries that visibly improve texture, scars, and pores.
services.microneedling.fullDescription: Our Microneedling treatment uses a precision medical device to create controlled micro-channels in the skin, triggering the body's natural wound-healing response and stimulating robust collagen and elastin production. This treatment is highly effective for reducing acne scars, minimizing enlarged pores, smoothing uneven texture, and improving overall skin tone. A hyaluronic acid or growth factor serum is applied during the procedure to penetrate deeply and amplify results. A series of treatments is recommended for transformative outcomes, with visible improvement after each session.
services.dermaplaning.name: Dermaplaning
services.dermaplaning.shortDescription: A gentle blade exfoliation that removes peach fuzz and reveals an instantly luminous complexion.
services.dermaplaning.fullDescription: Dermaplaning is a meticulous manual exfoliation technique in which a sterile surgical blade is used to gently remove the outermost layer of dead skin cells along with fine vellus hair. The result is an immediately smoother, brighter complexion that allows skincare products to absorb more effectively and makeup to apply flawlessly. This treatment involves no chemicals, no downtime, and is suitable for most skin types, including sensitive skin. Often paired with a facial or chemical peel for enhanced results.
services.ledLightTherapy.name: LED Light Therapy
services.ledLightTherapy.shortDescriptio: Non-invasive light energy that calms inflammation, stimulates collagen, and accelerates healing.
services.ledLightTherapy.fullDescription: Our LED Light Therapy sessions harness the power of specific light wavelengths to address a range of skin concerns without any discomfort or downtime. Red light stimulates collagen production and reduces the appearance of fine lines. Blue light targets acne-causing bacteria and calms active breakouts. Near-infrared light penetrates deeply to reduce inflammation and support tissue repair. Each session is relaxing and meditative — you simply recline while the light works at a cellular level. Ideal as a standalone treatment or as a powerful complement to facials, peels, and microneedling.
services.bodyContouring.name: Body Contouring
services.bodyContouring.shortDescription: Non-surgical body sculpting that reduces stubborn fat and tightens skin.
services.bodyContouring.fullDescription: Our Body Contouring treatments offer a non-invasive path to a more sculpted silhouette. Using advanced radiofrequency and ultrasound technology, we target stubborn fat deposits and stimulate collagen remodeling in areas resistant to diet and exercise — abdomen, flanks, thighs, arms, and chin. Each session is comfortable and requires no downtime, making it easy to integrate into your wellness routine. A personalized treatment plan is developed during your consultation, with most clients seeing progressive improvement over a series of sessions. The result is a smoother, firmer, more defined contour.
about.headline: A Sanctuary for Modern Wellness
about.description: At Sage & Stone, we believe that true beauty is an expression of inner balance. Our philosophy blends the precision of medical aesthetics with the wisdom of holistic healing — creating a space where science and serenity exist in harmony.
about.highlight1: Board-certified medical providers and licensed master estheticians
about.highlight2: Medical-grade treatments in a serene, spa-inspired environment
about.highlight3: Personalized treatment plans tailored to your unique goals
about.highlight4: Clean, cruelty-free products and the latest clinical technologies
about.title: About Sage & Stone
about.subtitle: A Sanctuary for Modern Wellness
about.philosophy: At Sage & Stone, we believe that true beauty is an expression of inner balance. Our philosophy blends the precision of medical aesthetics with the wisdom of holistic healing — creating a space where science and serenity exist in harmony. Every treatment is an invitation to slow down, reconnect, and emerge feeling more like yourself.
about.approach: Our approach is deeply personal. We begin every client relationship with a conversation, not a prescription. By understanding your goals, your lifestyle, and your skin's unique story, we craft treatment plans that honor who you are rather than chase trends. Our team of licensed estheticians, certified massage therapists, and experienced medical providers work collaboratively to ensure every visit is seamless, effective, and deeply restorative.
about.credentials: Sage & Stone is led by board-certified professionals with advanced training in aesthetic medicine, dermatological science, and therapeutic bodywork. Our facility maintains the highest standards of clinical safety while cultivating an atmosphere of warmth and calm. We invest continuously in the latest technologies, ongoing education, and the finest clinical-grade products to deliver results you can see and feel.
benefits.headline: The Difference Is in the Details
benefits.expertise.title: Clinical Expertise
benefits.expertise.description: Our team of board-certified providers and licensed specialists brings decades of combined experience in aesthetic medicine and therapeutic bodywork.
benefits.personalized.title: Personalized Care
benefits.personalized.description: Every treatment plan is built around you — your goals, your skin, your lifestyle. We never take a one-size-fits-all approach.
benefits.luxury.title: Luxury Environment
benefits.luxury.description: From our curated product lines to our serene treatment suites, every detail is designed to make your experience exceptional.
benefits.results.title: Visible Results
benefits.results.description: We combine the latest clinical technologies with proven techniques to deliver outcomes you can see and feel from your very first visit.
process.headline: How It Works
process.subtitle: From your first consultation to ongoing care, we make your wellness journey seamless and rewarding.
process.consult.title: Consultation
process.consult.description: Begin with a complimentary, in-depth conversation about your goals, concerns, and wellness history. We listen before we recommend.
process.customize.title: Custom Plan
process.customize.description: Your provider designs a personalized treatment plan that addresses your unique needs and fits your lifestyle and schedule.
process.transform.title: Transform
process.transform.description: Experience your treatments in our serene, state-of-the-art facility. Every session is crafted for comfort, safety, and real results.
process.maintain.title: Maintain & Elevate
process.maintain.description: We partner with you for the long term — refining your plan, tracking progress, and ensuring your results continue to improve.
testimonials.jessica.quote: I have been to spas across the country, and nothing compares to Sage & Stone. The attention to detail, the warmth of the staff, and the results speak for themselves. My skin has never looked this radiant.
testimonials.carlos.quote: As someone who was hesitant about med spa treatments, the team here made me feel completely informed and at ease. The results from my microneedling series have been incredible.
testimonials.rachel.quote: The Head Spa Ritual is pure magic. I carry so much tension and stress, and every session leaves me feeling like a new person. This is my monthly non-negotiable.
testimonials.anya.quote: From my very first Botox appointment to my monthly facials, Sage & Stone has become my sanctuary. The providers are exceptional and the environment is unmatched.
testimonials.headline: Trusted by Those Who Expect the Best
testimonials.guest1.quote: From the moment I walked in, I felt the difference. The attention to detail, the calm atmosphere, the expertise — Sage & Stone is in a class of its own. My skin has never looked better.
testimonials.guest1.name: Catherine M.
testimonials.guest2.quote: I was nervous about trying Botox for the first time, but the team here made me feel completely at ease. The results are so natural — I just look refreshed, not different. I will never go anywhere else.
testimonials.guest2.name: Lauren T.
testimonials.guest3.quote: The Head Spa Ritual was unlike anything I have ever experienced. I carry so much tension in my neck and scalp, and I left feeling like a completely different person. Pure bliss.
testimonials.guest3.name: Daniela R.
testimonials.guest4.quote: My husband and I did the couples massage for our anniversary and it was absolutely perfect. Private suite, incredible therapists, and the herbal tea afterward was a lovely touch.
testimonials.guest4.name: Priya S.
faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.firstVisit.question: What should I expect during my first visit?
faq.firstVisit.answer: Your first visit begins with a warm welcome and a brief consultation so we can understand your goals and any sensitivities. We will recommend the best treatment for your needs, walk you through every step, and ensure you feel completely comfortable before we begin. We encourage you to arrive 15 minutes early to settle in and enjoy our relaxation lounge.
faq.arriveEarly.question: How early should I arrive for my appointment?
faq.arriveEarly.answer: We recommend arriving 10 to 15 minutes before your scheduled appointment. This allows time to check in, complete any intake forms, change into a robe, and begin to unwind in our relaxation lounge before your treatment.
faq.injectablesSafe.question: Are injectable treatments safe?
faq.injectablesSafe.answer: Yes. All injectable treatments at Sage & Stone are administered by licensed, experienced medical professionals using FDA-approved products. We conduct a thorough consultation before any procedure to ensure it is appropriate for you and to discuss expected outcomes and any potential side effects.
faq.facialFrequency.question: How often should I get a facial?
faq.facialFrequency.answer: For most skin types, we recommend a professional facial every four to six weeks to align with your skin's natural cell turnover cycle. Your esthetician will recommend a personalized schedule based on your skin's specific needs and goals.
faq.cancellationPolicy.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faq.cancellationPolicy.answer: We kindly request at least 24 hours notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee equal to 50% of the scheduled service. We understand that life happens, and we are always happy to help you find a new time that works.
faq.giftCards.question: Do you sell gift cards?
faq.giftCards.answer: Yes! Our gift cards are available in any denomination and can be redeemed for any service, package, or retail product. They are available for purchase online with instant digital delivery or as an elegant physical card at our front desk.
faq.pregnancySafe.question: Which treatments are safe during pregnancy?
faq.pregnancySafe.answer: Our Prenatal Massage is specifically designed for expectant mothers and is safe throughout pregnancy. Certain facials and body treatments can also be adapted. However, we recommend avoiding injectables, chemical peels, and some advanced skin treatments during pregnancy. Your provider will guide you toward the safest options.
faq.membershipWorth.question: Is a membership worth it?
faq.membershipWorth.answer: If you value consistent self-care, absolutely. Members enjoy exclusive pricing, priority booking, complimentary add-ons, and special perks that make regular treatments both more accessible and more rewarding. Most members find the savings exceed the monthly investment within their first visit.
faq.downtime.question: Is there any downtime after treatments?
faq.downtime.answer: Downtime varies by treatment. Massage, facials, and LED therapy require no downtime at all. Botox and Dysport typically involve none. Dermal fillers may cause mild swelling for one to three days. Chemical peels and microneedling may involve several days of healing depending on intensity. Your provider will always discuss what to expect.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit.
faq.q1: What should I expect during my first visit?
faq.a1: Your first visit begins with a warm welcome and a brief consultation so we can understand your goals and any sensitivities. We will recommend the best treatment for your needs, walk you through every step, and ensure you feel completely comfortable before we begin. We encourage you to arrive 15 minutes early to settle in and enjoy our relaxation lounge.
faq.q2: How do I know if med spa treatments are right for me?
faq.a2: We offer complimentary consultations for all medical aesthetic services. During your consultation, one of our experienced providers will assess your skin, discuss your concerns, and recommend a personalized treatment plan. There is never any pressure — our goal is to educate and empower you to make the best decision for your skin and your confidence.
faq.q3: Is there any downtime after injectables or chemical peels?
faq.a3: Downtime varies by treatment. Botox and Dysport typically involve no downtime — you can return to your normal activities immediately. Dermal fillers may cause mild swelling or bruising for 1–3 days. Chemical peels range from no-peel refreshers to deeper peels with 5–7 days of visible flaking. Your provider will give you detailed aftercare instructions tailored to your specific treatment.
faq.a4: We kindly request at least 24 hours notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee equal to 50% of the scheduled service. We understand that life happens, and we are always happy to help you find a new time that works.
faq.q5: Do you offer packages or memberships?
faq.a5: Yes, we offer curated treatment packages and a tiered membership program that provides exclusive pricing, priority booking, and complimentary add-ons. Our memberships are designed for guests who want to make wellness a consistent part of their routine. Visit our Memberships page or ask our front desk for details.
faq.q6: Are your products cruelty-free and clean?
faq.a6: We are deeply committed to clean beauty. All products used in our treatments are cruelty-free, paraben-free, and sourced from brands that share our values of efficacy and integrity. We are happy to discuss specific product lines and ingredients during your visit.
faq.q7: Can I combine multiple treatments in one visit?
faq.a7: Absolutely. Many of our guests choose to pair treatments for a more comprehensive experience — for example, a facial followed by LED Light Therapy, or a massage combined with a body scrub. Our team will help you build a treatment plan that maximizes results while respecting your time and your skin's needs.
faq.q8: Is the spa suitable for men?
faq.a8: Sage & Stone warmly welcomes guests of all genders. Many of our treatments — including deep tissue massage, microneedling, chemical peels, and injectables — are popular among our male clientele. Our environment is designed to feel sophisticated and inclusive, and our providers tailor every treatment to the individual.

pages.about.value4.title: Innovation

pages.about.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a complimentary consultation to discover your personalized treatment plan.

pages.memberships.title: Memberships
pages.memberships.subtitle: Make wellness a ritual, not a rarity. Join the Sage & Stone Collective.
pages.memberships.faq1.question: Can I cancel my membership at any time?
pages.memberships.faq1.answer: We ask for a 3-month minimum commitment. After that, you may cancel with 30 days written notice. Any unused credits from the current month remain valid for 60 days after cancellation.
pages.memberships.faq2.question: Can I share my membership benefits with someone else?
pages.memberships.faq2.answer: Monthly service credits are for the member only. However, your discount on additional treatments can be applied when booking for immediate family members.
pages.memberships.faq3.question: What happens if I do not use my monthly service?
pages.memberships.faq3.answer: Unused monthly service credits roll over for up to 2 months. After that, they expire. We encourage you to make wellness a regular part of your routine.
pages.memberships.ctaSubtitle: Join the Sage & Stone Collective and make wellness a part of your everyday life.
pages.giftCards.title: Gift Cards
pages.giftCards.subtitle: Give the gift of tranquility. Perfect for any occasion.
pages.giftCards.presentationSubtitle: A Sage & Stone gift card is more than a present — it is an invitation to pause, restore, and feel extraordinary.
pages.giftCards.step1.title: Choose
pages.giftCards.step1.description: Select a denomination or enter a custom amount.
pages.giftCards.step2.title: Personalize
pages.giftCards.step2.description: Add a personal message and the recipient's details.
pages.giftCards.step3.title: Send
pages.giftCards.step3.description: Delivered digitally via email or as an elegant physical card.
pages.giftCards.noExpiration: No expiration date. No hidden fees. Redeemable for any service or product.
pages.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit.
pages.faq.general1.question: What should I expect during my first visit?
pages.faq.general1.answer: Your first visit begins with a warm welcome and a brief consultation so we can understand your goals and any sensitivities. We will recommend the best treatment for your needs, walk you through every step, and ensure you feel completely comfortable before we begin. We encourage you to arrive 15 minutes early to settle in and enjoy our relaxation lounge.
pages.faq.general2.question: Is the spa suitable for men?
pages.faq.general2.answer: Sage & Stone warmly welcomes guests of all genders. Many of our treatments — including deep tissue massage, microneedling, chemical peels, and injectables — are popular among our male clientele. Our environment is designed to feel sophisticated and inclusive.
pages.faq.general3.question: Are your products cruelty-free and clean?
pages.faq.general3.answer: We are deeply committed to clean beauty. All products used in our treatments are cruelty-free, paraben-free, and sourced from brands that share our values of efficacy and integrity.
pages.faq.treatments1.question: How do I know if med spa treatments are right for me?
pages.faq.treatments1.answer: We offer complimentary consultations for all medical aesthetic services. During your consultation, one of our experienced providers will assess your skin, discuss your concerns, and recommend a personalized treatment plan. There is never any pressure.
pages.faq.treatments2.question: Can I combine multiple treatments in one visit?
pages.faq.treatments2.answer: Absolutely. Many of our guests choose to pair treatments for a more comprehensive experience — for example, a facial followed by LED Light Therapy, or a massage combined with a body scrub. Our team will help you build a treatment plan that maximizes results.
pages.faq.treatments3.question: How often should I get a facial?
pages.faq.treatments3.answer: For most skin types, we recommend a professional facial every 4-6 weeks to align with your skin's natural cell turnover cycle. Your esthetician will recommend a personalized schedule based on your skin's specific needs and goals.
pages.faq.booking1.question: What is your cancellation policy?
pages.faq.booking1.answer: We kindly request at least 24 hours notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee equal to 50% of the scheduled service. We understand that life happens, and we are always happy to help you find a new time.
pages.faq.booking2.question: Do you offer packages or memberships?
pages.faq.booking2.answer: Yes, we offer curated treatment packages and a tiered membership program that provides exclusive pricing, priority booking, and complimentary add-ons. Visit our Memberships page for details.
pages.faq.aftercare1.question: Is there any downtime after injectables or chemical peels?
pages.faq.aftercare1.answer: Downtime varies by treatment. Botox and Dysport typically involve no downtime. Dermal fillers may cause mild swelling or bruising for 1-3 days. Chemical peels range from no-peel refreshers to deeper peels with 5-7 days of visible flaking. Your provider will give you detailed aftercare instructions.
pages.faq.aftercare2.question: What should I do after a microneedling session?
pages.faq.aftercare2.answer: After microneedling, avoid direct sun exposure, makeup, and active skincare ingredients for 24-48 hours. Keep your skin hydrated with a gentle, fragrance-free moisturizer and use SPF 30+ daily. Your provider will give you a complete aftercare guide.
pages.faq.stillHaveQuestionsSubtitle: We are here to help. Reach out and our team will be happy to assist you.
pages.contact.title: Contact Us
pages.contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you. Reach out to book, inquire, or simply say hello.
